zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Burton於1487年出生在英國薩默塞特可福可納時，她的父親Sir Edward Deol Burton30歲，母親Joyce  Jacossa Cresset17歲。她和Sir William Hough Hull至少有3個兒子。她去世於1519年在她的家鄉享年32歲。

nameMeanings.name: Burton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a placename that is very common in central and northern England. The derivation in most cases is from Old English burh ‘fort’ (see Burke ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Burton was born in 1487, in Crewkerne, Somerset, England, her father, Sir Edward Deol Burton, was 30 and her mother, Joyce  Jacossa Cresset, was 17. She had at least 3 sons with Sir William Hough Hull. She died in 1519, in her hometown, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Burton est née en 1487, à Crewkerne, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edward Deol Burton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joyce  Jacossa Cresset, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Sir William Hough Hull. Elle est décédée en 1519, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Burton 1487 in Crewkerne, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edward Deol Burton 30 und ihre Mutter Joyce  Jacossa Cresset 17. Sie hatte mit Sir William Hough Hull mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1519 im Alter von 32 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Burton è nata il nel 1487 nel Crewkerne, Somerset, England, sua padre, Sir Edward Deol Burton, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Joyce  Jacossa Cresset, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Sir William Hough Hull. Morì nel 1519, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 32 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Burton(이)가 1487년 영국 서머세트 크레w커니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edward Deol Burton(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joyce  Jacossa Cresset(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Hough Hull(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1519년 그녀의 고향에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Burton nasceu em 1487, em Crewkerne, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Deol Burton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joyce  Jacossa Cresset, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Sir William Hough Hull. Ela faleceu em 1519, em sua cidade natal, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Burton родилась в 1487 г. в местности крюкирн, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Edward Deol Burton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joyce  Jacossa Cresset, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Sir William Hough Hull. Она умерла в 1519 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Burton nació en 1487, en Crewkerne, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edward Deol Burton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joyce  Jacossa Cresset, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Sir William Hough Hull. Murió en 1519, en su pueblo, a la edad de 32 años.
